name: context-menu
title: Context Menu
description: Right-click menu with nested items and checkbox options.
docs:
# Context Menu
Right-click menu with nested items and checkbox options.
## Import
```tsx
import { ContextMenu, ContextMenuTrigger, ContextMenuContent, ContextMenuItem, ContextMenuSeparator, ContextMenuLabel, ContextMenuCheckboxItem, ContextMenuRadioItem, ContextMenuSub, ContextMenuSubTrigger, ContextMenuSubContent, ContextMenuRadioGroup } from "@/components/ui/context-menu";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<ContextMenu hint="Right click here" title={undefined} defaultOpen={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **hint** (string) — default: `"Right click here"`: Hint text
- **title** (string): Title
- **defaultOpen** (boolean): Default open
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add context-menu
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/context-menu
```
